hero.title: Spine Summer Camp
hero.subtitle: An unforgettable summer of learning, creativity, and fun for children ages 6–14.

sessions.title: Choose Your Session
sessions.subtitle: Two flexible options designed to fit your family's schedule

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Spine Summer Camp

items.question: What age groups are accepted?
items.answer: Spine Summer Camp accepts children between the ages of 6 and 14. We group campers by age to ensure age-appropriate activities.

items.question: What is the payment method?
items.answer: Payment is made via CBE Birr transfer. After registering, you will receive bank account details and must upload your receipt to confirm enrollment.

items.question: What should my child bring?
items.answer: Campers should bring a water bottle, a notebook, and any personal items they may need. A full list of required materials will be sent upon registration approval.

items.question: Can I register for both sessions?
items.answer: Each child may only register for one session. If you have multiple children, you may register each child separately for different sessions.

items.question: How long does approval take?
items.answer: After uploading your payment receipt, we review it within 24 hours and send a confirmation email to the parent's email address provided during registration.

payment.importantNote: Important: Make sure the exact amount is transferred. Include your reference number in the transfer memo if possible.
